h2562cf23ga9f3g48fbg9c1dg9a29f7d4fa50: That you, Gimblebock? Everything all right out there?
h3bf767e4g8553g464dgbee0g9666504c29f1: Gimblebock ran. Your friends abandoned you.
h23753aa3g01b4g4bdfg8756g4627399709fb: Yeah? That lot always were a bit soft.
h1ed584aeg97d2g433bgad73g96baca6ff5a3: But I've got plenty of friends who ain't soft. Come in here and you can meet 'em...
h165a3857ga1aag4b19gbcc4g15928cab9620: I killed your friends - now I'm here for you.
h935cbb84g47eeg4259g8f3dg94320bbbabf4: Yeah? I've got plenty more friends - come in here and you can meet 'em...
hc6d45fc4g2456g493fgb5e1gcee6bcc87828: You sound a bit shaken, boss. Hang on while I find the key...
h1dca7627gf5c6g4b3ag9736gbb6c07da5594: Think I'm stupid? Don't know who you are, or what you've done with the boss...
ha0939ec4g52feg419ag9aedgf00d41f8398f: ... but if you come through that door, you're getting a knife in the guts.
h16c41fe0g574cg489cg9adcge62ab4467965: Yeah, it's me. Let me in!
hcebf66d4g93c1g45b2gb77cg50713821b8e6: Gimblebock triggered some trap. He needs help - now!
h84ad3af4g5bc6g4c4bgb500g1533f3f8e900: I told him it wasn't safe out there. Get inside, and I'll rustle up some bandages...
h9a905fe6gffdcg452dg9079g02cad496a625: Yeah? And who are you? Probably your trap that did him in...
h6d7359b1g9708g4218gb7d9gc543e67057bd: ... come through that door, and you're getting a knife in the guts.
